# Fork patches applied on top of vanilla UnRAR source after each upgrade.
#
# Order matters:
#   1-3: small bug/platform fixes, independent from each other
#   4-6: batch-extraction feature chain (4 must come before 5 and 6;
#        5 is a perf pass over code added by 4; 6 adds callbacks into
#        the loop introduced by 4 and refined by 5)

# fix(unrar): RAROpenArchiveEx BAD_DATA handle (cherry-pick of upstream 5accdb7d)
9d38459f07e4fd6093246c35c98921579281aee2

# fix(unrar): RARReadHeaderEx/ProcessFile thread-safe error reporting
162e1a589e388ce183a70f721cb820b99d5a71bf

# chore(dll): guard __builtin_cpu_supports on non-glibc (macOS 15 Intel fix)
c3b414e28f87f06df43d6ab91220faf1647f7433

# feat(unrar): RARExtractAll/W batch extraction (dll.cpp, dll.hpp, dll.def)
56263690aff9a6ef8bb999621518e7e7783d9218

# perf(unrar): optimize RARExtractAllW extraction loop
33f57e0be1ef980cb44acb9af32209eaaa53dde8

# feat(dll): UCM_EXTRACTFILE/_OK/_ERR progress callbacks inside RARExtractAllW
a428b778817f73b2f0481b79dc3d549b1569906e
